Credit card requirement for a free app
Consistent failure to convert common file types

App crashes or freezes (e.g., stuck at 'preparing file')
Server/connection issues preventing upload or conversion

Poor or confusing user interface/layout

Fast conversion speed
Feature parity with or superiority to the website version
Intuitive, easy-to-use file selection and interface
More file format support and features (merge/split epub/docx)
Stable performance without crashes or freezes
Clear, bug-free permission/access system
Reliable offline functionality
Trustworthy data security
